entity.description: FairPrice Glass Cleaner effectively cleans glass surfaces without leaving any dirt, stains, grime or streaks. It provides extra shine and is suitable for car windscreen, mirrors, TV screens, ceramics and other glass surfaces.

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Directions:
1. Turn nozzle clockwise and spray solution onto surface
2. Wipe clean with a dry, soft cloth or kitchen towel

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct sunlight and heat

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

metaData.Ingredients: Sodium Hypochlorite, Alkyl Amine Oxide, Sodium Hydroxide
metaData.Key Information:
• For bathroom use
• No scrub formula
• Eliminates stubborn stains & mould
• Kills germs & bacteria • Extra shine
metaData.Preparation:
Directions for use:
1. Turn safety stopper and align with "foam" marking at tip of nozzle with groove in the centre of yellow strip
2. Hold bottle 10cm away from mold stains. Squeeze and release lever to dispense solution
3. Rinse thoroughly with water after a few minutes
4. After use, align the safety stopper tip with "closed" marking. Be sure to wash your hands after use

metaData.Key Information:
• Mr Muscle toilet cleaner is able to effectively clean your toilet, even under the rim
• Removing tough stains with HCl active formulation
• It is able to kill 99.9% of germs and eliminate odour with the pleasant lemon scent leaving the toilet smelling fresh
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions for use:
1. To open cap, squeeze both pads and unscrew
2. Lift toilet seat and simply direct Mr.Muscle Deep Action Gel under the rim and squeeze evenly to coat entire bowl
3. Replace and close cap tightly
• To clean and eliminate odours:
Leave for 5 minutes, brush above and below the waterline and flush
• To kill bacteria and remove tough stains: Reapply, leave for 60 minute or overnight and flush
metaData.SAP Product Name: MR MUSCLE DEEP ACTION GEL POWER 3S  500ML

product.name: Mr Muscle Toilet Cleaner - Extra Power (Value Pack)

metaData.Preparation:
1. Flush the toilet before cleaning
2. Apply 6 oz. under and around rim to coat the inside of bowl
3. Scrub the entire bowl and allow to sit for 10 minutes for disinfecting
4. Flush the toilet to rinse
